articles.author: Michael Marot
articles.title: Late pass sends Felix Rosenqvist past David Malukas for the closest Indianapolis 500 win in history - AP News
articles.description: Felix Rosenqvist swung to the outside of David Malukas, then found a way past the Team Penske driver to win the closest Indianapolis 500 in history by a margin of 0.0233 seconds. Malukas looked like he was in position to win when he passed race leader Marcus …
articles.content:
INDIANAPOLIS (AP) Felix Rosenqvist thought his car was good enough to win the previous four Indianapolis 500s. On Sunday, the 34-year-old Swede finally got to celebrate with a sip of milk.
